What We Do

Full service.
No compromises.

Whether you're buying, selling, investing, or developing — Élan Realty provides complete real estate services executed to a standard the market rarely sees.

Residential Sales

Premium residential property across Brisbane and South East Queensland. We present your home to the buyers who matter — with marketing, staging, and negotiation that achieves the price it deserves.

Buyer's Advocacy

Searching for your next home or investment? Our buyer's advocates work exclusively for you — identifying properties, negotiating terms, and protecting your interests at every stage.

Property Management

Your investment, managed properly. From tenant selection to maintenance coordination, we protect your asset and maximise your return — without the stress.

Investment Advisory

Data-led investment strategy for those building a portfolio. We identify opportunities before the market does — then help you move on them with confidence.

Development Consulting

From site identification to project marketing, we support developers at every phase — bringing market intelligence, buyer networks, and premium positioning to every project.

Leasing

Residential and commercial leasing solutions for landlords and tenants. We match the right tenant to the right property — quickly, professionally, and with care.

"The finest properties deserve the finest representation."

standard.

Years Experience

Standard

Expertise

How We Work

A deliberate
process.

Every engagement with Élan Realty follows a structured process designed to protect your interests, maximise your outcome, and remove the stress that so often accompanies real estate.

01
Consultation

We begin with a detailed consultation to understand your goals, timeline, and expectations. No pressure. No obligation. Just an honest conversation about how we can help.

02
Strategy

Every property and every buyer is different. We develop a bespoke strategy tailored to your specific situation — pricing, marketing, timing, and target audience.

03
Execution

Premium marketing across all relevant channels. Professional photography, copywriting, digital and print campaigns — positioned to attract the right buyers at the right price.

04
Negotiation

This is where experience matters most. We negotiate hard on your behalf — with the data, the relationships, and the resolve to achieve the outcome you deserve.

05
Settlement & Beyond

We guide you through to settlement and remain available after. A successful transaction is the beginning of a long-term relationship — not the end of one.

Where We Operate

Our Market

Primarily focused on Brisbane's premium inner suburbs, we also operate across South East Queensland and selectively interstate.

Inner Brisbane
Queensland

Hamilton, New Farm, Teneriffe, Ascot, Paddington and surrounding premium suburbs.

South East QLD
Queensland

Gold Coast, Sunshine Coast, Noosa and the premium coastal and hinterland markets.

Selective Interstate
Australia

By referral and relationship only, across Sydney, Melbourne and key interstate markets.
